description: Defines Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) for authentication-related requests and responses in a Spring Boot backend project.

classes.name: AuthDtos
classes.description: Container class for various authentication-related DTOs, using Java records for data encapsulation.

methods.name: RegisterRequest
methods.description: DTO for user registration requests, including email and password with validation annotations.

methods.name: RegisterResponse
methods.description: DTO for registration response, including user ID, email, and MFA status.

methods.name: LoginStep1Request
methods.description: DTO for first step login request, containing email and password with validation.

methods.name: LoginStep1Response
methods.description: DTO for first step login response, including user ID and MFA pending status.

methods.name: VerifyMfaRequest
methods.description: DTO for MFA verification request, containing OTP.

methods.name: TokenResponse
methods.description: DTO for token data return, including access and refresh tokens and token type.

methods.name: RefreshRequest
methods.description: DTO for token refresh request, including the refresh token.

methods.name: LogoutRequest
methods.description: DTO for logout request, including the refresh token.
